title: GitHub - blendi-remade/earth-cinema: Chrome extension that transforms Google Earth views into cinematic shots using fal.ai · GitHub
text:
Earth Cinema
Chrome extension that transforms Google Earth 3D views into cinematic images and videos using
fal.ai
.
Features
Capture
any Google Earth 3D view
Transform
with AI (Nano Banana Pro) into cinematic shots
Generate videos
(Veo 3.1) with customizable duration and audio
Setup
Clone this repo
Go to
chrome://extensions/
Enable "Developer mode"
Click "Load unpacked" → select this folder
Get your API key at
fal.ai/dashboard/keys
Click the extension icon and enter your API key
Usage
Navigate to
earth.google.com
Find a scenic 3D view (works with any other view too, street view can also be really cool!)
Click the extension icon
Enter your fal.ai API key (first time only)
Capture → Transform → Generate Video
Tech
Chrome Extension (Manifest V3)
fal.ai
APIs:
nano-banana-pro/edit
(image transformation)
veo3.1/fast/image-to-video
(video generation)
